caption: A man in a white shirt and dark vest speaks from a podium in a formal room with wood-paneled walls and brown blinds. He gestures with his hand as he addresses a seated audience. The audience consists of several people viewed from behind, including a man in a grey plaid jacket, a woman in a blue and white sash, and a woman in a yellow top. To the right of the podium, other individuals are seated, including someone in a purple garment. A white graphic with the text "ORCA" is overlaid on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man at the podium continues speaking and gesturing, while the seated audience members remain mostly stationary, watching him. The lighting is consistent, and the camera angle remains fixed throughout the scene.
